title: crataegus rosiformis var. carpatica
intro: Crataegus rosiformis var. carpatica, also known as the Carpathian hawthorn, is a shrub or small tree species within the Crataegus genus, which is a type of thorny fruit-bearing plant native to Europe. The Carpathian hawthorn is valued for its medicinal properties, including its ability to reduce blood pressure and improve cardiovascular health due to its high content of flavonoids and oligomeric proanthocyanidins. The health benefits of Crataegus rosiformis var. carpatica include lowering the risk of cardiovascular disease, improving lipid profiles, and enhancing antioxidant defenses. Herbal preparations of the Carpathian hawthorn can be made from its leaves, flowers, or fruits, and are often used in traditional medicine to create teas, tinctures, and infusions.
